title: elaeocarpus corneri
intro: Elaeocarpus corneri, also known as the 'Corner's Elaeocarpus' or 'Pride of India', is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. Traditionally, Elaeocarpus corneri has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Elaeocarpus corneri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to make various remedies and potions.
